title: T-032 — SCN-030 Receive TO 3-step UI (06-b)
prompt:
# T-032 — SCN-030 Receive TO

PRD: docs/prd/06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.2 FR-SC-FE-022
UX: prototypes/design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md:391-414 §3.8
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-receive.jsx:267-294 (to_list_screen), :297-385 (to_scan_screen)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Deliver SCN-030 — list → scan (LP checklist ✓/○ + scan input + partial-accept) → done (accepted LPs + warnings for un-scanned).

## Implementation contract
1. Routes /scanner/receive/to, /scanner/receive/to/[id]/scan, /scanner/receive/to/done.
2. Scan step shows LP checklist with ✓/○ per expected LP and a partial-accept button.
3. Wires to T-029 receive-to-line.
4. Done step renders accepted-LP table + un-scanned warning banner.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/receive/to/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/receive/to/[id]/scan/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/receive/to/done/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scn-030-receive-to.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the 3 steps render, when compared to `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-receive.jsx:267-294,297-385`, then they have the same TO list, the same LP checklist with ✓/○ markers, the same partial-accept button placement, and the same done summary — RTL snapshot + manual checklist
2. Given two of three expected LPs are scanned and the user taps 'Akceptuj częściowo', when the action runs, then 2 receive-to-line calls are issued and the done step shows the third LP under 'Niezeskanowane'
3. Given an LP is scanned that is not in the TO checklist, when ScanInput emits, then a red flash + 'LP poza TO' error banner is shown and no API call is made

## Test strategy
- RED: write scn-030-receive-to.test.tsx asserting parity + partial accept + out-of-list error before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scn-030-receive-to'

## Risk red lines
- Do not let an LP outside the TO checklist trigger an API call
- Do not navigate to done before all expected receive calls have committed
- Do not omit the un-scanned warning

pipeline_inputs.description: SCN-030 Receive TO 3-step UI with checklist + partial-accept + done summary; wired to /receive-to-line.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist:
1) TO list rows match prototype.
2) Scan step shows LP checklist with ✓/○.
3) Partial-accept button at bottom.
4) Out-of-list scan triggers red flash + error banner without API call.
5) Done step lists accepted LPs and warns about un-scanned.
out_of_scope: Do not implement PO receive UI here (T-031)
Do not implement supervisor over-receipt override
Do not implement P2 flows here: transfer-order (TO) creation, replenishment, cycle-count, inquiry full traceability — P1 stubs only
Do not implement offline queue write-path here (P2); P1 keeps offline-safe scan buffer + indicator only
acceptance_criteria: Given the 3 steps render, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-receive.jsx:267-294 and :297-385, then they have the same TO list, the same LP checklist with ✓/○, the same partial-accept button placement, and the same done summary — RTL snapshot + manual checklist
Given two of three expected LPs scanned and 'Akceptuj częściowo' tapped, when the action runs, then 2 receive-to-line calls are issued and done shows the third LP under 'Niezeskanowane'

Given an LP outside the TO checklist is scanned, when ScanInput emits, then a red flash + 'LP poza TO' banner is shown and no API call is made. Follow parity evidence requirements in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED: write scn-030-receive-to.test.tsx asserting parity + partial accept + out-of-list error before implementation
For UI parity, capture 390x844 screenshots and Playwright trace/video artifacts; attach artifact paths in closeout per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
risk_red_lines: Do not call API for out-of-list scan
Do not navigate to done before all commits
Do not bypass scanner.* permission namespace when wiring server actions
Do not regress operator-friendly touch targets (>=48dp) or mobile viewport 390x844 evidence
